case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. SEAN CONLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 33 8TH STREET, APARTMENT #1304 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED AUG-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONLEY, SEAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $103.33. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
